ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change dropdown to modify different groups of settings
ast.target: 更改下拉菜单以修改不同组的设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change dropdown to modify styles and settings of different codeblock sections
ast.target: 更改下拉菜单以修改不同代码块部分的样式和设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, styling will be applied when exporting to PDF.
ast.target: 如果启用，导出为PDF时将应用样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new theme from the current settings.
ast.target: 从当前设置创建一个新主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how rounded the codeblocks appear in pixels.
ast.target: 以像素为单位确定代码块的圆角程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, languages with icons display a left border with the colour of the icon. The slider sets the width of the border.
ast.target: 如果启用，带有图标的语言将显示带有图标颜色的左边框。滑块用于设置边框的宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to unwrap lines in reading mode
ast.target: 选择是否在阅读模式下换行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, in reading mode, holding click on a codeblock will wrap the lines for better visibility.
ast.target: 如果启用，在阅读模式下，按住代码块将换行以提高可见性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, the below settings are disabled too.
ast.target: 如果禁用，以下设置也将被禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights will also highlight the line numbers.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮也将高亮行号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the current line number in codeblocks will be indicated with a separate colour.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块中的当前行号将用单独的颜色标示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the font size for header language tags and titles.
ast.target: 设置头部语言标签和标题的字体大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Style the header title text using bold and italic toggles, by setting a font or by setting a text colour.
ast.target: 使用粗体和斜体开关、设置字体或设置文本颜色来设置头部标题文本的样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Title placeholder text for folded code when no title parameter is set.
ast.target: 当未设置标题参数时，折叠代码的标题占位符文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colour of the line separating the codeblock header and the codeblock.
ast.target: 分隔代码块头部和代码块的线条颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine when to show language tags in the header. "Title Only" will only show language tags when the title parameter is set.
ast.target: 确定何时在头部显示语言标签。\"仅标题\"将仅在设置了标题参数时显示语言标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determine when to show language icons where available. "Title Only" will only show language tags when the title parameter is set.
ast.target: 确定何时显示可用的语言图标。\"仅标题\"将仅在设置了标题参数时显示语言标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Style the header language tag text using bold and italic toggles, by setting a font or by setting a text colour.
ast.target: 使用粗体和斜体开关、设置字体或设置文本颜色来设置头部语言标签文本的样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, language icons will be black and white.
ast.target: 如果禁用，语言图标将是黑白的。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the size of the displayed language icons.
ast.target: 设置显示的语言图标的大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display repository in codeblock header for external references.
ast.target: 在代码块头部显示外部引用的仓库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display repository version in codeblock header for external references.
ast.target: 在代码块头部显示外部引用的仓库版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the timestamp at which the reference was last updated.
ast.target: 显示引用上次更新的时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights the active line inside codeblocks.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮代码块内的活动行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define a new alternative highlight name. The colour can be modified after it is added.
ast.target: 定义一个新的替代高亮名称。颜色可以在添加后修改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights fade away to the right. The slider sets the gradient colour stop as a percentage.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮向右淡出。滑块以百分比设置渐变颜色停止点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should not decorate. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的列表定义插件不应装饰的语言。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符(*)。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，例如：ad-info, ad-error 等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should style despite being processed by another plugin. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的列表定义插件应设置样式的语言，尽管它们已被另一个插件处理。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符(*)。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，例如：ad-info, ad-error 等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, in reading mode, inline code will be syntax highlighted based on a language set with `{language} highlighted_inline_code`. See the README for more information.
ast.target: 如果启用，在阅读模式下，内联代码将根据使用 `{language} highlighted_inline_code` 设置的语言进行语法高亮。更多信息请参阅 README。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, inline code will be styled.
ast.target: 如果启用，内联代码将被设置样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text colour of inline code titles.
ast.target: 内联代码标题的文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how bold inline code titles appear.
ast.target: 确定内联代码标题的粗体程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text colour when editing inline code.
ast.target: 编辑内联代码时的文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how bold inline code appears.
ast.target: 确定内联代码的粗体程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how rounded inline code appear in pixels.
ast.target: 以像素为单位确定内联代码的圆角程度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how much vertical inner padding in pixels inline code has.
ast.target: 以像素为单位确定内联代码的垂直内边距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how much horizontal inner padding in pixels inline code has.
ast.target: 以像素为单位确定内联代码的水平内边距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines how much horizontal outer margin is added to the inline code in pixels.
ast.target: 以像素为单位确定添加到内联代码的水平外边距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlights the active line outside codeblocks.
ast.target: 启用后，将高亮显示代码块外的活动行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, external references will be updated automatically on load when possible.
ast.target: 启用后，加载时将尽可能自动更新外部引用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will return all inbuilt themes to the plugin defaults
ast.target: 这将把所有内置主题恢复为插件默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for UI buttons like the copy code button.
ast.target: 用于UI按钮，如复制代码按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 颜色按钮在激活时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Parameters and language which would follow codeblock delimiter.
ast.target: 参数和语言，将跟在代码块分隔符之后。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to render as example inside code delimiters.
ast.target: 在代码分隔符内渲染为示例的文本。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 标题语言标签背景颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 标题语言标签文本样式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 内联代码标题字体粗细

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 内联代码活动文本颜色

ast.name: setName
ast.source: External References Automatic Update on Load
ast.target: 外部引用加载时自动更新

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 示例代码块参数字符串

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换语言标签文本加粗

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换语言标签文本斜体

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换编辑器活动行高亮

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 切换自动更新外部引用

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 警告：无法解析计算字符串

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 警告：无法获取当前主题

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select a theme first to delete
ast.target: 请先选择一个主题再删除

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You cannot delete the default themes

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set a name for your theme
ast.target: 请为您的主题设置一个名称

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You can't overwrite the default themes

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot override the default highlight parameter.
ast.target: 无法覆盖默认高亮参数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法使用其他默认参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected element after head. Expected the element before `</head>`
ast.target: head 标签后出现意外元素。期望在 `</head>` 之前出现元素

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>` or `->`. Expected `-->` to close comments
ast.target: 意外的 `>` 或 `->`。期望使用 `-->` 关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the public identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在公共标识符后出现闭合的 `\"` 或 `'`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `>`. Expected a closing `"` or `'` after the identifier identifier
ast.target: 意外的 `>`。期望在标识符后出现闭合的 `\"` 或 `'`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `[0-9]` for decimal references or `[0-9a-fA-F]` for hexadecimal references
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望十进制引用使用 `[0-9]`，十六进制引用使用 `[0-9a-fA-F]`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `<![CDATA[` in HTML. Remove it, use a comment, or encode special characters instead
ast.target: HTML 中出现意外的 `<![CDATA[`。请移除它，使用注释，或对特殊字符进行编码

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly high character reference. Expected character references to be at most hexadecimal 10ffff (or decimal 1114111)
ast.target: 字符引用值意外过高。期望字符引用最大为十六进制 10ffff（或十进制 1114111）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly closing tag. Expected other tags to be closed first
ast.target: 意外的闭合标签。期望先闭合其他标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected control character `%x`. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 意外的控制字符 `%x`。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly control character in reference. Expected a non-control code point, 0x00, or ASCII whitespace
ast.target: 引用中出现意外的控制字符。期望非控制码点、0x00 或 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected text character `%c`. Only use text in `<noscript>`s in `<body>`
ast.target: 意外的文本字符 `%c`。仅在 `<body>` 中的 `<noscript>` 内使用文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpectedly double attribute. Expected attributes to occur only once
ast.target: 意外的重复属性。期望属性仅出现一次

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end tag. Expected no end tag or another end tag
ast.target: 意外的结束标签。期望无结束标签或另一个结束标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected tag name instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望出现标签名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `]]>` to close the CDATA
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望使用 `]]>` 关闭 CDATA

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望使用 `-->` 关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected a valid doctype (such as `<!doctype html>`)
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望有效的文档类型（如 `<!doctype html>`）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected text or a closing tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望文本或闭合标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected `>` to close the tag
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望使用 `>` 关闭标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected `-->` to close the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。期望使用 `-->` 关闭注释

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected `<!--` to open the comment
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望使用 `<!--` 开启注释

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在 `%c` 处出现意外的序列。期望 `public` 或 `system`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected an ASCII letter instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype. Expected doctype before head
ast.target: 意外的文档类型。期望在 head 之前出现文档类型

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected start tag `<head>`. Expected `<head>` directly after doctype
ast.target: 意外的起始标签 `<head>`。期望在文档类型后直接出现 `<head>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected an attribute value or no `%c-1` instead
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。期望属性值或不出现 `%c-1`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expected a `<!doctype html>` before anything else
ast.target: 期望在任何内容之前出现 `<!doctype html>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected doctype end at `%c`. Expected `html` instead
ast.target: 在 `%c` 处意外结束文档类型。期望出现 `html`

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望 `public` 的标识符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望 `system` 的标识符（建议：`\"about:legacy-compat\"`）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望 ASCII 空白字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `<noscript>`. Expected a closing tag or a meta element
ast.target: 意外的 `<noscript>`。期望闭合标签或 meta 元素

ast.name: description
ast.target: 期望 `<!doctype html>` 或 `<!doctype html system \"about:legacy-compat\">`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。请勿在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use noncharacters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用非字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。请勿在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected end of file. Expected closing tag instead
ast.target: 意外的文件结尾。期望闭合标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点。请勿在 HTML 中使用孤立代理字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use lone surrogate characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用孤立代理字符

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在 `%c` 处出现意外字符。期望 `>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Expected whitespace, `/`, `>`, `=`, or probably an ASCII letter
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。期望空白、`/`、`>`、`=` 或可能是 ASCII 字母

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Quote the attribute value to include it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请引用属性值以包含它

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c`. Add an attribute name before it
ast.target: 意外的 `%c`。请在它之前添加属性名

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected code point `%x`. Do not use NULL characters in HTML
ast.target: 意外的码点 `%x`。请勿在 HTML 中使用 NULL 字符

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected `%c-1`. Expected it followed by `>` or in a quoted attribute value
ast.target: 意外的 `%c-1`。期望它后跟 `>` 或在带引号的属性值中

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unexpected character reference. Expected known named character references
ast.target: 意外的字符引用。期望已知的命名字符引用

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reset fold state for all codeblocks
ast.target: 重置所有代码块的折叠状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Update all external references in vault
ast.target: 更新库中所有外部引用

ast.name: name
ast.source: Update all external references in note
ast.target: 更新笔记中所有外部引用

ast.name: name
ast.target: 移除所有不需要的外部引用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings for the Code Styler Plugin.

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you like this plugin, and would like to help support continued development, use the button below!
ast.target: 如果您喜欢此插件，并希望帮助支持持续开发，请使用下方的按钮！
